name: Cataratas del Iguazú
shortDescription: Massive waterfalls surrounded by rainforest.
description: One of the largest waterfall systems in the world, featuring hundreds of cascades surrounded by lush rainforest and diverse wildlife.

name: Glaciar Perito Moreno
shortDescription: A dynamic glacier with dramatic ice breaks.
description: A famous advancing glacier known for its massive ice walls and frequent ice ruptures, offering a unique and powerful natural spectacle.

name: Bariloche
shortDescription: A mountain town with lakes and alpine views.
description: A popular destination known for its lakes, mountains, and winter sports, combining natural beauty with a charming alpine-style town.

name: Ruta de los 6000s
shortDescription: A high-altitude road through volcanic landscapes.
description: A scenic route surrounded by some of the highest volcanoes in the Andes, offering breathtaking views and extreme landscapes.

name: Villa La Angostura
shortDescription: A peaceful village by lakes and forests.
description: A quiet and scenic destination surrounded by forests and lakes, ideal for relaxation and outdoor activities in nature.

name: Villa Traful
shortDescription: A hidden gem with crystal-clear waters.
description: A small and tranquil village known for its clear lakes and untouched landscapes, perfect for disconnecting from busy life.

name: Villa Carlos Paz
shortDescription: A lively city known for entertainment and nightlife.
description: A popular tourist city offering theaters, nightlife, and lake activities, making it a vibrant destination for all ages.

name: Teatro Colón
shortDescription: One of the world's top opera houses.
description: A historic and world-renowned theater known for its exceptional acoustics and architecture, hosting opera, ballet, and concerts.

name: Jardín Japonés
shortDescription: A serene garden inspired by Japanese design.
description: A peaceful space with ponds, bridges, and traditional elements, offering a calm escape within the city.

name: Talampaya
shortDescription: Red rock canyons shaped by time.
description: A national park known for its towering red rock formations and ancient geological history.

name: Valle de la Luna
shortDescription: A surreal desert landscape like another planet.
description: A unique natural park featuring unusual rock formations and landscapes that resemble the surface of the moon.

name: Cuesta del Portezuelo
shortDescription: A scenic mountain road with stunning views.
description: A famous route offering panoramic views of valleys and mountains, known for its winding roads and viewpoints.

name: Villa de Merlo
shortDescription: A calm destination with microclimate benefits.
description: A popular spot known for its pleasant climate, mountain views, and opportunities for relaxation and outdoor sports.

name: San Rafael
shortDescription: Adventure and wine in one destination.
description: A region known for its outdoor activities like rafting and its proximity to vineyards and wine experiences.

name: Pumamarca
shortDescription: A colorful mountain in northern Argentina.
description: A striking natural formation with vibrant layers of minerals creating a rainbow-like mountain.

name: Tandil
shortDescription: A city known for hills and local food.
description: A charming city famous for its landscapes, hiking spots, and traditional food products like cheese and salami.

name: Península Valdés
shortDescription: A world-renowned wildlife sanctuary.
description: A UNESCO World Heritage site famous for its rich marine biodiversity, including whales, sea lions, and penguins, offering unique wildlife observation experiences.

name: Las Grutas
shortDescription: Warm waters and beach life.
description: A popular beach destination known for its warm waters and seaside activities during the summer.

name: Tafí del Valle
shortDescription: A valley surrounded by mountains and culture.
description: A scenic valley offering cultural experiences, local traditions, and beautiful mountain landscapes.

name: Termas de Río Hondo
shortDescription: A destination for thermal relaxation.
description: A well-known destination for its thermal baths and spa experiences, ideal for rest and wellness.
